{"acceptance_criteria":["Reject empty project names.","Reject whitespace-only project names.","Reject project names longer than 80 characters.","Accept normal project names that contain non-whitespace characters and are at most 80 characters long."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Validate Create-Project Names

## Goal
Validate project names used by the create-project flow.

## Requirements
- Empty names are invalid.
- Whitespace-only names are invalid.
- Names longer than 80 characters are invalid.
- Normal names with non-whitespace content and length of 80 characters or fewer are valid.

## Non-Goals
- Do not change unrelated project creation behavior.
- Do not add persistence, UI, or CLI changes beyond name validation unless already required by existing code boundaries.","risks":["Existing validation behavior may be shared with other flows, so changes should be scoped to avoid unintended regressions.","Length counting may need to match existing JavaScript string semantics unless the codebase already defines a different rule."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Tests cover empty string rejection.","Tests cover whitespace-only rejection.","Tests cover names longer than 80 characters rejection.","Tests cover acceptance of a normal valid name."],"description":"Add or update create-project name validation and focused tests for invalid and valid project-name inputs.","id":"task-validate-create-project-names","likely_files":["src/project-name.js","test/project-name.test.js"],"title":"Validate create-project names","validation_commands":["npm test"]}]}

{"acceptance_criteria":["Reject empty project names.","Reject whitespace-only project names.","Reject project names longer than 80 characters.","Accept normal project names that contain non-whitespace characters and are at most 80 characters long."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Validate Create-Project Names

- Do not add persistence, UI, or CLI changes beyond name validation unless already required by existing code boundaries.","risks":["Existing validation behavior may be shared with other flows, so changes should be scoped to avoid unintended regressions.","Length counting may need to match existing JavaScript string semantics unless the codebase already defines a different rule."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Tests cover empty string rejection.","Tests cover whitespace-only rejection.","Tests cover names longer than 80 characters rejection.","Tests cover acceptance of a normal valid name."],"description":"Add or update create-project name validation and focused tests for invalid and valid project-name inputs.","id":"task-validate-create-project-names","likely_files":["src/project-name.js","test/project-name.test.js"],"title":"Validate create-project names","validation_commands":["npm test"]}]}
